li.xpath: Defs/VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef[not(hide)][defName="Precision" or defName="CloseQuarters" or defName="Gunner" or defName="VSE_Sniping" or defName="Sharp" or defName="Blunt" or defName="VSE_Striking" or defName="Tamer" or defName="Rancher" or defName="Hunter" or defName="Trainer" or defName="QualityExpert" or defName="QuantityExpert" or defName="Flooring" or defName="Repairman" or defName="Architect" or defName="Foreman" or defName="VSE_Smoothing" or defName="Butcher" or defName="DrugChef" or defName="IndustrialChef" or defName="MechanoidExpert" or defName="Tailor" or defName="Weaponsmith" or defName="IndustrialProcessExpert" or defName="Surgeon" or defName="BattlefieldMedic" or defName="InfectiousDiseaseExpert" or defName="VSE_Operating" or defName="Driller" or defName="OreExpert" or defName="Tunneller" or defName="Geologist" or defName="Pharmacologist" or defName="Hacker" or defName="Researcher" or defName="VSE_Writing" or defName="VSE_DarkStudy" or defName="Forager" or defName="Treespeaker" or defName="HarvesterCareful" or defName="GreenThumb" or defName="Warden" or defName="Negotiator" or defName="Proselytizer" or defName="VSE_Lovin"]

match.xpath: Defs/VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef[not(hide)][defName="AS_Blasting" or defName="AS_Mortaring" or defName="AS_Pummeling" or defName="AS_Cleaving" or defName="AS_Evading" or defName="AS_Enduring" or defName="AS_CraftingQuality" or defName="AS_CraftingYield" or defName="AS_Smelting" or defName="AS_Panning" or defName="AS_Salvaging" or defName="AS_Trafficking" or defName="AS_Influencing" or defName="AS_Psycasting" or defName="AS_Quelling" or defName="AS_Piloting" or defName="AS_VacuumResilience" or defName="AS_RangedDodging" or defName="AS_Mindfulness"]

Defs/VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef[not(hide)][defName="Hauts_Demolisher" or defName="Hauts_Surveyor" or defName="Hauts_GauranlenExpert" or defName="Hauts_GauranlenExpert2" or defName="Hauts_Skulduggery" or defName="Hauts_Larceny" or defName="Hauts_Teacher" or defName="Hauts_Recycler"]

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Marksman
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in placing a shot exactly where it needs to land, however far away that is, and in walking artillery fire onto a target.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Gunslinger
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in weight of fire: snapping the weapon on target, working the action and putting the next round downrange before the enemy recovers.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Warblade
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in offensive melee: finding the gap in an opponent's guard and driving the blow through whatever armor sits behind it.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Skirmisher
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in never being where the blow lands: reading an attack early, slipping it, and recovering before the next one comes.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Overchanneler (vanguard)
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in forcing more through the mind than it was ever meant to carry, worked out at arm's length where the feedback hits hardest. The power is real and so is the price: sleep comes hard, composure comes harder, and the heat never fully leaves.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Overchanneler (artillerist)
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in forcing more through the mind than it was ever meant to carry, worked out at range where the target never sees the source. The power is real and so is the price: sleep comes hard, composure comes harder, and the heat never fully leaves.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Beastmaster
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in reading an animal's temper: winning over the wild ones, train the tame ones, and knowing when to back away.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Herd steward
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in what animals and waters provide: milk, wool, eggs and a full net, gathered quickly and without waste.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Cultivator
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in worked ground: sowing a field fast and bringing every last usable part of it back to the stockpile.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Wildwalker
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in unworked ground: living off what grows on its own, and tending the trees that answer back.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Virtuoso
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in the piece that stops people in the corridor. Nothing leaves the bench until it is right, and that takes as long as it takes.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Prolific artisan
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in output. Sculptures leave the bench at a pace that keeps every wall and every trade caravan supplied.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Quietist
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in the discipline of the still mind. Heat bleeds away as fast as it gathers and focus is never quite spent, but a mind kept this quiet never learns to shout.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Master builder
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in building things that stand: fewer botched frames, better work, and a sure hand at fixing what breaks. None of it done in a hurry.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Siteworker
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in raw throughput on site: walls up, floors down, roofs closed and rock smoothed, and a good eye for where not to step.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Gastronome
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in what goes into the pot and what comes out of it safely, whether the recipe is dinner or something rather less legal.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Victualler
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in feeding a crowd: meals off the stove at speed and every carcass stripped down to the last usable scrap.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Artificer
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in the fine end of the workbench: weapons and garments finished to a standard the buyer can feel, at a pace no quartermaster enjoys.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Fabricator
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in volume and salvage: components by the crate, slag back into ingots, and dead mechanoids stripped for everything they hold.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Mechwright
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in the upkeep of mechanoids: chassis kept running on less power, damage hammered out fast, and a fighting trim their overseer never programmed in.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Chirurgeon
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in the operating table: a steady hand under the lamp and a patient who is closed up and breathing sooner.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Physician
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in everything that is not surgery: wounds dressed fast and dressed well, and fevers that break on schedule.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Assayer
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in reading the rock before striking it, so that more comes out of the seam and the odd glint is never missed.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Excavator
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in moving stone. Tunnels advance, drills bite deeper, and the mountain gives way faster than it should.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Scholar
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in learning and passing it on: research, books, sealed systems that would rather stay sealed, and students who would rather not listen.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Anomalist
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in the things that should not be studied: prying them open faster, learning more from what is found inside, and keeping them quiet while it happens.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Technician
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in complicated machinery and complicated chemistry, and in staying calm while operating either one.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Mechlord
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in holding more mechanoids in mind at once, reaching them further out, and growing their replacements faster than they are lost.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Diplomat
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in talking other people into things: better prices, quieter borders, and the occasional change of faith.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Taskmaster
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in people who do not want to be here: taking them alive, keeping them in line, and eventually making them one of yours.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Confidant
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in steadying the people around them, and in letting very little of what happens actually stick.

VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.label: Cutpurse
VSE.Expertise.ExpertiseDef.description: An expertise in other people's property and other people's vices, and in being somewhere else by the time either is missed.
